entity.label: Amariah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the descendants of Aaron by Eleazar (1 Chr. 6:7, 52). He was probably the last of the high priests of Eleazar’s line prior to the transfer of that office to Eli, of the line of Ithamar.

nodes.label: Amariah
nodes.description: One of the descendants of Aaron by Eleazar (1 Chr. 6:7, 52). He was probably the last of the high priests of Eleazar’s line prior to the transfer of that office to Eli, of the line of Ithamar.

nodes.label: Meraioth
nodes.description: Father of Amariah, a high priest of the line of Eleazar (1 Chr. 6:6, 7, 52).

nodes.label: Ahitub
nodes.description: The father of Zadok, who was made high priest by Saul after the extermination of the family of Ahimelech (1 Chr. 6:7, 8; 2 Sam. 8:17).

verses.text: Meraioth begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,
Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,
